common: Proved by Dr. Wm. B. Griggs (HIPPURIC ACID)

head.text: Pain over right eye, dull, constant, worse in warm room. Eyelids inflamed and swollen

mouth_throat.text: Sore, raw, dry, swallowing difficult, foul odor, gummy exudate; thickness and infiltration of all tissues around throat

stomach_abdomen.text: Acid rising. Lump in pit of stomach. Soreness and pressure over liver

female.text: Menstrual flow for three weeks with complete relief of muscular and joint pains

extremities.text: Backache extending down hips. Pain in shoulders and extremities and sore swollen joints. Pain in middle of thigh posteriorly shooting down right leg. Tired, grating sensation in the joints

skin.text: Itching, burning. Papules looking like goose flesh on chest

keynotes.text: color="#800000">HIPPURICUM ACIDUM Proved by Dr. Wm. B. Griggs (HIPPURIC ACID) Its chief action is on the external tissues of the eyes and naso-pharynx joint surfaces, liver and mucous membranes. Right side especially affected, general muscular soreness.
